$schema_note: Per-template manifest. The render service scans template-manifests/<workflow>/<NAME>/manifest.json and aggregates all entries. `file` is the .indd filename (no directory) — the service resolves it via TEMPLATES_DIR. Add a new template by (1) dropping its .indd into TEMPLATES_DIR (out of repo), (2) creating a sibling folder here with a manifest.json of this shape, (3) restarting the service.
label: 6 Tiles template with defaults
static_frames_note: Other named frames in this template (agent names patrick_sior/max_sior, contacts jack_contact/patrick_contact/max_contact, logo, company_info, declaration, decorative *_frame, tile_N tile-background frames) are static and not surfaced in the dashboard. The user manages them in InDesign directly.
